_benchmark_meta.note: Example export illustrating the telegram_export contract in spec.yaml. The agent (from_id user5550001) plays the SCMDB skill; the human is user4440002. This sample shows a PASS-ish transcript.

messages.text: yo where do i grind rep for a quantum drive

[Data: patch 4.8.1-live.11875683] A few factions unlock quantum-drive blueprints:
1. Covalex — hauling — QD blueprints at Master standing
2. Ling Family Hauling — hauling — QD at Rookie
3. Red Wind Linehaul — hauling — QD at Junior
Which one would you like to grind, or want me to pick by a specific QD?
covalex i guess, im at contractor with em

[Data: patch 4.8.1-live.11875683] You're at Contractor with Covalex. Here's the grind to the QD unlock tier (Master). I'm assuming solo and no specific ship (so no cargo batching) — tell me your ship for batching tips.

Tier            -> Next            | Runs | Best Mission                     | Rep/run | UEC/hr
Contractor      -> Sr. Contractor  |   18 | Covalex Direct Delivery (batch)  |     85  | 110,000
Sr. Contractor  -> Experienced    |  110 | Covalex Bulk Haul                |     90  |  98,000
Experienced     -> Master          |   60 | Covalex Recovery                 |     95  | 105,000

Total: ~188 runs, ~24 hrs.
Notes:
- Covalex Direct missions often share a pickup terminal — accept several and combine into one trip if SCU allows.
- The Sr. Contractor -> Experienced segment is the wall (~110 runs); confirm Covalex is the faction you want before committing.
Want the blueprint materials and a mining route for the crafting step too?
